mapper.select: select id from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('SUCCESS','PARTIAL_FAILED','FAILED','CANCELLED','TERMINATED') and finished_at is not null and finished_at < #{cutoff} order by id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into archive.job_instance_archive ( id, tenant_id, job_definition_id, trigger_request_id, job_code, instance_no, biz_date, trigger_type, instance_status, queue_code, worker_group, priority, dedup_key, version, expected_partition_count, success_partition_count, failed_partition_count, trace_id, params_snapshot, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, deadline_at, expected_duration_seconds, sla_alerted_at, batch_no, operator_id, rerun_flag, retry_flag, rerun_reason, related_file_id, parent_instance_id, result_summary, run_attempt, high_water_mark_in, high_water_mark_out, calendar_code, data_interval_start, data_interval_end, job_definition_version, rerun_policy_snapshot, replay_session_id, dry_run ) select id, tenant_id, job_definition_id, trigger_request_id, job_code, instance_no, biz_date, trigger_type, instance_status, queue_code, worker_group, priority, dedup_key, version, expected_partition_count, success_partition_count, failed_partition_count, trace_id, params_snapshot, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, deadline_at, expected_duration_seconds, sla_alerted_at, batch_no, operator_id, rerun_flag, retry_flag, rerun_reason, related_file_id, parent_instance_id, result_summary, run_attempt, high_water_mark_in, high_water_mark_out, calendar_code, data_interval_start, data_interval_end, job_definition_version, rerun_policy_snapshot, replay_session_id, dry_run from batch.job_instance where id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.job_partition_archive ( id, tenant_id, job_instance_id, partition_no, partition_key, partition_status, worker_group, worker_code, lease_expire_at, retry_count, business_key, idempotency_key, input_snapshot, output_summary, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, version, current_invocation_id, invocation_started_at, dry_run) select id, tenant_id, job_instance_id, partition_no, partition_key, partition_status, worker_group, worker_code, lease_expire_at, retry_count, business_key, idempotency_key, input_snapshot, output_summary, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, version, current_invocation_id, invocation_started_at, dry_run from batch.job_partition where job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.job_task_archive ( id, tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, task_type, task_seq, task_status, assigned_worker_code, task_payload, result_summary, error_code, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, version, error_key, error_args, priority, failure_class, dry_run, effective_parameters, heartbeat_details, heartbeat_at, cancel_requested, task_timeout_seconds) select id, tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, task_type, task_seq, task_status, assigned_worker_code, task_payload, result_summary, error_code, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, version, error_key, error_args, priority, failure_class, dry_run, effective_parameters, heartbeat_details, heartbeat_at, cancel_requested, task_timeout_seconds from batch.job_task where job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.job_step_instance_archive ( id, tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, job_task_id, step_code, step_type, step_status, retry_count, related_file_id, result_summary, error_code, error_message, version, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, error_key, error_args) select id, tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, job_task_id, step_code, step_type, step_status, retry_count, related_file_id, result_summary, error_code, error_message, version, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, error_key, error_args from batch.job_step_instance where job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.pipeline_instance_archive ( id, tenant_id, pipeline_definition_id, job_code, pipeline_type, file_id, related_job_instance_id, current_stage, last_success_stage, run_status, trace_id, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at) select id, tenant_id, pipeline_definition_id, job_code, pipeline_type, file_id, related_job_instance_id, current_stage, last_success_stage, run_status, trace_id, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at from batch.pipeline_instance where related_job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.pipeline_step_run_archive ( id, pipeline_instance_id, step_code, stage_code, run_seq, step_status, input_summary, output_summary, error_code, error_message, retry_count, duration_ms, started_at, finished_at, error_key, error_args) select id, pipeline_instance_id, step_code, stage_code, run_seq, step_status, input_summary, output_summary, error_code, error_message, retry_count, duration_ms, started_at, finished_at, error_key, error_args from batch.pipeline_step_run where pipeline_instance_id in ( select id from batch.pipeline_instance where related_job_instance_id in #{id} ) on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.file_dispatch_record_archive ( id, tenant_id, file_id, pipeline_instance_id, channel_code, dispatch_target, dispatch_status, dispatch_attempt, receipt_code, receipt_status, external_request_id, error_code, error_message, dispatched_at, ack_at, created_at, updated_at, error_key, error_args) select id, tenant_id, file_id, pipeline_instance_id, channel_code, dispatch_target, dispatch_status, dispatch_attempt, receipt_code, receipt_status, external_request_id, error_code, error_message, dispatched_at, ack_at, created_at, updated_at, error_key, error_args from batch.file_dispatch_record where pipeline_instance_id in ( select id from batch.pipeline_instance where related_job_instance_id in #{id} ) on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.workflow_run_archive ( id, tenant_id, workflow_definition_id, related_job_instance_id, biz_date, run_status, current_node_code, trace_id, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, dry_run) select id, tenant_id, workflow_definition_id, related_job_instance_id, biz_date, run_status, current_node_code, trace_id, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, dry_run from batch.workflow_run where related_job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.workflow_node_run_archive ( id, workflow_run_id, node_code, node_type, run_seq, node_status, retry_count, error_code, error_message, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, output, error_key, error_args, sensor_next_probe_at, sensor_last_probe_at, sensor_probe_count, sensor_error_count) select id, workflow_run_id, node_code, node_type, run_seq, node_status, retry_count, error_code, error_message, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, output, error_key, error_args, sensor_next_probe_at, sensor_last_probe_at, sensor_probe_count, sensor_error_count from batch.workflow_node_run where workflow_run_id in ( select id from batch.workflow_run where related_job_instance_id in #{id} ) on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.job_execution_log_archive ( id, tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, log_level, log_type, trace_id, message, detail_ref, extra_json, created_at) select id, tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, log_level, log_type, trace_id, message, detail_ref, extra_json, created_at from batch.job_execution_log where job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.compensation_command_archive ( id, tenant_id, command_no, compensation_type, target_id, job_code, biz_date, batch_no, related_job_instance_id, related_file_id, approval_id, operator_id, reason, strategy, command_status, trace_id, result_summary, error_code, error_message, created_at, finished_at, error_key, error_args) select id, tenant_id, command_no, compensation_type, target_id, job_code, biz_date, batch_no, related_job_instance_id, related_file_id, approval_id, operator_id, reason, strategy, command_status, trace_id, result_summary, error_code, error_message, created_at, finished_at, error_key, error_args from batch.compensation_command where related_job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing
